import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { HlmButtonImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/button'; import { HlmContextMenuImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/context-menu'; import { HlmDialogImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/dialog'; import { HlmDropdownMenuImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/dropdown-menu'; @Component({ selector: 'spartan-dialog-context-menu', imports: [HlmDialogImports, HlmButtonImports, HlmDropdownMenuImports, HlmContextMenuImports], template: `
Right click here

Print this page

Are you sure you want to print this page? Only print if absolutely necessary! The less we print, the less paper we need, the better it is for our environment!

`, }) export class DialogContextMenuPreview {}

import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { HlmButtonImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/button'; import { HlmDialogImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/dialog'; import { HlmInputImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/input'; import { HlmLabelImports } from '@spartan-ng/helm/label'; @Component({ selector: 'spartan-dialog-preview', imports: [HlmDialogImports, HlmLabelImports, HlmInputImports, HlmButtonImports], template: `

Edit profile

Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.
`, }) export class DialogPreview {}
